zh.lifeSummary: Sir John Fray是William Frey的兒子，於1391年出生在英國艾可格亞特 沃爾坦。他於1436年10月與Agnes Danvers在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾德雷頓結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1461年7月3日在英國米德萊可享年70歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾斯米費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John Fray是William Frey的儿子，于1391年出生在英国艾可格亞特 沃爾坦。他于1436年10月与Agnes Danvers在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾德雷頓结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1461年7月3日在英国米德萊可享年70岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾斯米費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Fray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: rare variant of   Frey   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
English: from the personal name Fray, probably an Anglo-Norman French form of ancient Germanic Fredo (a pet form of names beginning with Fred- or Freth-), which was used by the Normans in Normandy.
English: nickname for a violent person, from Middle English fray, a shortened form of Middle English (Old French) affrai ‘attack, brawl, uproar’.

variants.name: Frey
meanings: Swiss German and German: status name for a free man, as opposed to a bondsman or serf, in the feudal system, from Middle High German vrī ‘free, independent’. This surname is also found in Hungary, Poland, and especially in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Free and Frei .
History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Sir John Fray was born in 1391, in Great Waltham, Essex, England as the son of William Frey. He married Agnes Danvers in October 1436, in Drayton, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 3 July 1461, in Middlesex, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Smithfield, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir John Fray est né en 1391, à Great Waltham, Essex, Angleterre, fils de William Frey. Il a épousé Agnes Danvers en octobre 1436, à Drayton, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 3 juillet 1461, à Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Smithfield, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir John Fray wurde 1391 in Great Waltham, Essex, England, als Sohn von William Frey geboren. Er hat im Oktober 1436 in Drayton, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Danvers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Juli 1461 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Middlesex, England und wurde in Smithfield, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir John Fray è nato il nel 1391 nel Great Waltham, Essex, England come figlio di William Frey. Lui sposato Agnes Danvers nel ottobre 1436, nel Drayton, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 3 luglio 1461, nel Middlesex, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Smithfield, Staffordshire, England.

ja.Great Waltham, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサム
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Frayは1391年にイギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサムでWilliam Freyの息子として生まれた。1436年10月にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアドレイトンでAgnes Danversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1461年7月3日にイギリスミッドレセックスで70歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアスミスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Fray(은)는 1391년 영국 에세스 그리트 월섬에서 William Frey의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1436년 10월 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드라이턴에서 Agnes Danvers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1461년 7월 3일 영국 미들레세스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 스미스필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir John Fray nasceu em 1391, em Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra filho de William Frey. Ele casou-se com Agnes Danvers em outubro de 1436, em Drayton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de julho de 1461, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Smithfield, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir John Fray родился в 1391 г. в местности грит валтам, эссекс, Англия. Его отца звали William Frey. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Danvers октябрь 1436 г. в местности дреитон, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 3 июля 1461 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности смитфиелд, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir John Fray nació en 1391, en Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra como hijo de William Frey. Se casó con Agnes Danvers en octubre de 1436, en Drayton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 3 de julio de 1461, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Smithfield, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
